subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Praise be to God that the Orb of Splendor hath cast its rays upon thee and honored thee with the luminosity of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا الحمد لله نیر اشراق پرتوی بر تو افکند و ترا بنورانیت هدایت مشرف و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
